author: sec-ml
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Very simple plugin that allows any file extension to be registered as Markdown (e.g. mdx, svx, rmd, qmd, mdown, mkdn, mkd, mdwn, mdtxt, mdtext, myst, markua). User-configurable in settings.

manifest.author: sec-ml
manifest.description: Very simple plugin that allows any file extension to be registered as Markdown (e.g. mdx, svx, rmd, qmd, mdown, mkdn, mkd, mdwn, mdtxt, mdtext, myst, markua). User-configurable in settings.
manifest.name: Anything as Markdown

name: Anything as Markdown

releases.author: sec-ml
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Force obsidian indexing/caching by @sec-ml in https://github.com/sec-ml/obsidian-anything-as-md/pull/3
* Obsidian review bot lint fixes by @sec-ml in https://github.com/sec-ml/obsidian-anything-as-md/pull/4


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/sec-ml/obsidian-anything-as-md/compare/1.0.0...1.1.1

releases.author: sec-ml
releases.description: First version. Allows Obsidian to recognise any file extension (taken from user-configurable list) as Markdown.
releases.name: Initial release
